title: AST Assault 4 x2, Criminal Mischief 5: Wasilla [AK25080222]

title: DOF Statewide Fire Roundup for August 10th, 2025
summary: August 10 th , 2025 Tok Area: 7 Mile Lookout Fire (#222) 4,094 acres I Containment: 55% I Total Personnel: 52 Update: Warm, dry weather and gusty winds on Saturday increased fire activity. Tanana Chiefs (T2IA) and North Star (T2) crews, supported by helicopters with buckets and two water scooping aircraft, worked to slow spread in a steep, unburned white spruce drainage on the east side. A drone flight on Friday used infrared to map hot spots where crews knocked down heat on the north and southeast sides, but hot spots in the drainage persisted...

title: Burn Permits suspended in Tok Prevention Area
summary: Beginning Sunday morning, August 10, burn permits for the Tok Fire Prevention Area are suspended due to very high fire danger because of high temperatures, gusty winds, and low humidity. NWS Alaska Fire Weather Map DOF Burn Permit Map Burn permits are suspended Sunday morning, August 10th, in the To...

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Fairbanks [AK25078076]
summary: On 08/10/25 at approximately 0037 hours, Alaska State Troopers responded to a report of a disturbance after the fact near Goldhill Road in Fairbanks. Troopers responded and discovered that Zoe Elizabeth Rice had a warrant for her arrest. Rice was arrested and remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST DUI: Fairbanks [AK25080069]
summary: On 08/10/2025 at approximately 0343 hours, I conducted a traffic stop on a speeding sedan. The driver, Connor Orion English, admitted to drinking before driving and believed that he was likely over the legal limit, according to statements he made. After a series of Standardized Field Sobriety Tests, English demonstrated signs of impairment. English was charged with Driving While Under the Influence and remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Warrant Arrest, False Report, VCOR: Fairbanks [AK25080072]
summary: On 08/10/2025 at 0357 hours a Trooper stopped out with a vehicle at a gas station in Fairbanks associated with Tara Murphy. Tara gave the Trooper a false name and was arrested for her felony arrest warrant. She was charged with False Report and VCOR.
sourceAttribution: Multiple Sources (2 reports)

title: AST Traffic: North Pole [AK25080054]
summary: On 08/10/2025 at approximately 01:09 Troopers initiated a traffic stop on a red Nissan pickup that failed to stop at a stop sign. The driver identified as Kaleb D. Corbet of North Pole, was found to be driving while under the influence. He was arrested and remanded to FCC with no further incident.

title: AST DV Assault: Wasilla [AK25080053]
summary: On 08/09/2025, AST was dispatched to a report of a disturbance off Pennington Place. Investigation revealed that PAUL FINE, 30, of Wasilla, had assaulted a family member. He was charged with a total of 13 counts: two counts of Assault 2, six counts of Assault 3, four counts of Assault in the Presenc...

title: AST Disturbance: Big Lake [AK25079993]
summary: On 08/09/2025 at approximately 19:53 hours AST Dispatch received a report of a disturbance in a Big Lake. title: Trump administration seeks to revoke limits on oil drilling in parts of Alaska’s North Slope
summary: James Brooks Alaska Beacon The U.S. Department of the Interior announced on Thursday that it will revoke three documents intended to form the basis for limits on oil drilling in the National Petroleum Reserve in Alaska. Those documents, and the limits themselves, were issued in the last year of Pres...
